9.reason: [The function call uses hardcoded value 1 instead of reading input N; should read N from stdin and pass it to per(N, 1)]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function call uses hardcoded value 1 instead of reading input N; should read N from stdin and pass it to per(N, 1)]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The function call passes fixed arguments (1,1) instead of reading input N and passing it. This causes the program to always generate permutations for N=1 regardless of actual input, and also fails to read input at all.]
